Story quest chain

Weapons Cartel

5 parts

Targets6
Rewards3

Chain Overview

StartWarp Gate
SystemArrenius
Parts5
First questWeapons Cartel: Part 1

Defeat 25 Elite Stalker lvl 4, Elite Triad lvl 4

Route & Targets

  • System: Kapello
  • Location: Fanatic Outpost in Kapello
  • Targets: Elite Stalker lvl 4, Elite Triad lvl 4, Elite Guardian lvl 8, Elite Gunner lvl 10, Elite Launcher lvl 10, Rotator

Part 1: Weapons Cartel: Part 1

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Defeat 25 Elite Stalker lvl 4, Elite Triad lvl 4

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Start at Warp Gate in Arrenius.
  2. Defeat 25 Elite Stalker lvl 4, Elite Triad lvl 4.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Weapons Cartel: Part 2.

Description

AFTransmission: "Good day captain! We have a new mission for you, we need you to take out a few Elite Triads and Elite Stalkers for us to cripple the enemy stronghold in Hyperion."

Completion

AF Transmission: "Good work captain! This area will not threat us for a while. We will send you another missions soon. However, we still need to find out how they aquire all the weapons."

Part 2: Weapons Cartel: Part 2

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1600-1800

Defeat 10 Elite Guardian lvl 8

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 10 Elite Guardian lvl 8.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Weapons Cartel: Part 3.

Description

AF Transmission: "We have another fortified position in Kapello that we need to take care of. We need you to destroy 10 elite guardians. Beware of the turret Nova, it will destroy any missiles you fire at them."

Completion

AF Transmission: "You have once again proven your skills as a captain. I think its time to move on and do us a real favour. We have located the weapon cartel and need you to take action."

Part 3: Weapons Cartel: Part 3

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 2400-2800

Travel / deliver to Fanatic Outpost

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Fanatic Outpost.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Weapons Cartel: Part 4.

Description

AF Transmission: "Before we pursuit the cartel. Help the AF Hunters destroy and recapture the old junk yard from the Fanatics cult. It should be close to the elite zone in Kapello. Watch out for their piercing guns."

Completion

AF Transmission: "They seem to be gone for now, but they will surely be back to create more trouble. However, we have found evidence they have aquired weapons from the cartel we discovered."

Part 4: Weapons Cartel: Part 4

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeship
Level range0
RewardMission XP 2400-2800

Defeat 12 Elite Gunner lvl 10, Elite Launcher lvl 10

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat 12 Elite Gunner lvl 10, Elite Launcher lvl 10.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Weapons Cartel: Part 5.

Description

AF Transmission: "The Graven stronghold in Arrenius has been the central node for an underground weapons cartel. We need you to eliminate the Elite Gunners and Elite Lanchers so that we can infiltrate it."

Completion

AF Transmission: "It looks like we have found a few interesting things while you attacked Graven. Apparently the weapons are transported via Kapello.

Its probably the supply line for all enemy strongholds in the Antor system. We need to put at stop to it."

Part 5: Weapons Cartel: Part 5

CategoryStory
Typekill
Subtypeboss
Level range0
RewardEnemy Strongholds: Part 5

Defeat Rotator

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Defeat Rotator.

Description

AF Transmission: "You have already done a lot so far. However, the weapons originate from a Nezerian ship called the Rotator in the Kapello system. Please destroy it to make sure we can stop the weapon transports.

Completion

AF Transmission: "With the Rotator gone we managed to stop a lot of weapon transports into this system.

The technology found on the Rotator is Nezerian. Its a hostile spieces most active in the Gellan and Rapir System. Although we have very little information about whats happening in the Rapir system.

You have done us a great favour. Collect the reward and we might contact you again."

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
